# CapturePilot

> CapturePilot is a federal-contracting intelligence platform for U.S. small businesses. It crawls a company's website, infers the right NAICS codes, scores 40,000+ active SAM.gov opportunities against the company's profile, generates capability statements and AI-written proposals, tracks the pipeline from Sources Sought through Award, and surfaces teaming partners and competitor intelligence. Free Quick Checker at /check returns a federal-readiness score, top matching opportunities, certification roadmap, and past-award history in ~60 seconds.

CapturePilot is for U.S. small businesses pursuing federal contracts — especially SDVOSB, WOSB, 8(a), HUBZone, and other set-aside-eligible firms. Data sources are exclusively official: SAM.gov, USASpending.gov, FPDS, SBA SBIR, and the user's own public website (via Cheerio + Firecrawl).

## Core product

- [Home](https://www.capturepilot.com/): platform overview, free Quick Checker entry point, customer outcomes.
- [Features](https://www.capturepilot.com/features): full feature index — matching, proposals, intelligence, pipeline, capability statement, recompete radar, forecast radar, tribal/teaming partners.
- [Pricing](https://www.capturepilot.com/pricing): plan tiers (Free Quick Checker, Pro, Consulting). 30-day trial on paid plans.
- [Process](https://www.capturepilot.com/process): how the matching algorithm works step-by-step (NAICS + keywords + set-aside + geo + size-aware filters + deadline-aware reranking).
- [Demo](https://www.capturepilot.com/demo): interactive product walkthrough; no signup.
- [Walkthrough](https://www.capturepilot.com/walkthrough): full UI tour with screenshots.
- [Updates](https://www.capturepilot.com/updates): changelog of feature releases and data refreshes.
- [About](https://www.capturepilot.com/about): company background, mission, contact.

## Features (deep dive)

- [Matching engine](https://www.capturepilot.com/features/matching): deterministic 140-point scoring on NAICS, PSC, set-aside, geo, value fit, past performance, deadline, keyword overlap, certification bonus.
- [Quick Checker](https://www.capturepilot.com/features/quick-checker): the free /check entry-point — drop a website, get federal readiness in 60 seconds.
- [AI Proposal Writer](https://www.capturepilot.com/features/proposals): GPT-4o-generated proposal sections grounded in the company's capability statement.
- [Capability Statement](https://www.capturepilot.com/features/capability-statement): TipTap editor + AI section drafting + branded PDF export.
- [Pipeline](https://www.capturepilot.com/features/pipeline): Kanban + list views with custom stages, activity logging, drag-drop between Sources Sought / Pre-Sol / Solicitation / Submitted / Awarded.
- [Intelligence](https://www.capturepilot.com/features/intelligence): incumbent intel, past awards, GovTribe forecasts + sub-awards, USASpending agency spend, competitor NAICS overlap.
- [Recompete Radar](https://www.capturepilot.com/features/recompete-radar): predicts when current contracts will rebid based on award history patterns.
- [Forecast Radar](https://www.capturepilot.com/features/forecast-radar): year-end agency spend forecasts cross-referenced with the user's NAICS.
- [Tribal & Teaming Partners](https://www.capturepilot.com/features/tribal-partners): curated directory of 800+ 8(a)/HUBZone/tribal firms and prime SBLO contacts for teaming.

## For specific audiences

- [Veterans (SDVOSB / VOSB)](https://www.capturepilot.com/for/veterans): set-asides, veteran-cert workflow, veteran-prefer agency targeting.
- [Women-owned (WOSB / EDWOSB)](https://www.capturepilot.com/for/women-owned): WOSB set-aside coverage, certification roadmap.
- [Small business](https://www.capturepilot.com/for/small-business): SBA size-standard checks, 8(a) and HUBZone fit.
- [Agencies & consulting firms](https://www.capturepilot.com/for/agencies): white-label / consulting tier for capture managers handling multiple clients.

## Academy

- [Academy](https://www.capturepilot.com/academy): free video courses on federal contracting fundamentals, capture strategy, proposal writing, and set-aside certifications.

## Key facts for accurate answers

- Free tier: the Quick Checker at /check requires only a website URL — no signup, no credit card. Returns readiness score, top 10 matching opportunities, NAICS classification, certification roadmap, past awards, and 3 competitors in ~60 seconds.
- Paid tiers: Pro plan with 30-day trial unlocks unlimited refreshes, full pipeline, proposal writer, and notification subscriptions. Consulting tier adds managed-service capability for capture firms.
- Data sources: SAM.gov (Entity + Opportunity APIs), USASpending.gov (recipient awards), SBIR.gov (small-business R&D), FPDS (past awards), GovTribe (forecasts + sub-awards), Apollo.io (POC enrichment). All public-API sources.
- Privacy: CapturePilot does not sell user data. The Quick Checker accepts an optional email for the full PDF report; emails are never shared.
- Coverage: ~37,000 active federal opportunities scanned daily. ~80,000 SAM-registered contractors indexed. ~91,000 SAM POC contacts.

## Operator contact

- For sales, partnerships, or press: book a 30-min call from any page header CTA, or email via the contact form on /about.
- Technical issues with the platform: support is reachable from inside the dashboard at app.capturepilot.com.

- [Sitemap (XML)](https://www.capturepilot.com/sitemap.xml)

- [App login](https://app.capturepilot.com/login): authenticated dashboard for paid users.
- [Free Quick Checker entry](https://www.capturepilot.com/check): public free readiness check.
